name: Pirates on the Horizon
description: Investigate rumors of pirate activity threatening Melaka's shipping lanes.

stages.description: Learn about the pirate threat from Rashid.
stages.journalEntry: Rashid speaks of pirates spotted near the straits. Ships have gone missing. The authorities should be informed.

stages.description: Report the pirate sightings to Capitão Rodrigues.
stages.journalEntry: I should inform the fortress garrison about the pirate threat. Capitão Rodrigues will want to know.

stages.description: Gather more information about the pirates.

objectives.description: Ask Chen Wei about Chinese shipping losses
Ask Aminah what the fishermen say

stages.journalEntry: The Capitão wants more details before he can act. The merchants and fishermen may have useful information.

stages.description: Follow up on the lead in Kampung Quarter.
stages.journalEntry: Aminah mentioned that fishermen from the kampung saw a suspicious ship anchored in a hidden cove. I should investigate.
I've gathered enough information for the garrison. The pirates seem to be using a cove south of the city. Capitão Rodrigues will send patrols. Perhaps there's more to discover another time...

report.greeting: Friend! Have you told the Portuguese about the pirates? They need to know!

pirates.text: Hurry! Every day more ships are at risk. The Capitão commands the garrison - he can send patrols!
Pirates, you say? I need more than sailor's tales to mobilize the garrison. Get me details - where were they seen? What ships? Bring me facts!
